ddls:
CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "experiment_name" TEXT /* Name of the experiment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the experiment */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the experiment */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the experiment */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the experiment (e.g., running, completed, failed) */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who initiated the experiment */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the experiment belongs to */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset used for the experiment */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model used for the experiment */,
  "hardware_config_id" INTEGER /* ID of the hardware configuration used for the experiment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_hardware_config_id FOREIGN KEY ("hardware_config_id") REFERENCES hardware_config ("hardware_config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "training_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric record */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the metric belongs to */,
  "step" TEXT /* Step of the training process (e.g., Step_0, Step_1) */,
  "std_return" REAL /* Standard deviation of returns */,
  "num_trajectories" INTEGER /* Number of trajectories */,
  "average_policy_std" REAL /* Average policy standard deviation */,
  "average_return" REAL /* Average return */,
  "average_discounted_return" REAL /* Average discounted return */,
  "max_return" REAL /* Maximum return */,
  "min_return" REAL /* Minimum return */,
  "policy_exec_time" REAL /* Policy execution time */,
  "env_exec_time" REAL /* Environment execution time */,
  "loss_before" REAL /* Loss before training */,
  "loss_after" REAL /* Loss after training */,
  "kl_inner" REAL /* KL divergence for inner steps */,
  "kl_outer" REAL /* KL divergence for outer steps */,
  "kl_divergence" REAL /* KL divergence */,
  "entropy" REAL /* Entropy */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_training_metrics_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "time_metrics" (
  "time_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each timing record */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the timing record belongs to */,
  "step" TEXT /* Step of the training process (e.g., Step_0, Step_1) */,
  "time_maml_steps" REAL /* Time taken for MAML steps */,
  "time_inner_step" REAL /* Time taken for inner steps */,
  "time_outer_step" REAL /* Time taken for outer steps */,
  "time_sampling" REAL /* Time taken for sampling */,
  "time_env_exec" REAL /* Environment execution time */,
  "time_total_inner" REAL /* Total time for inner steps */,
  "itr_time" REAL /* Iteration time */,
  "time_rollout" REAL /* Time taken for rollout */,
  "time_policy_update" REAL /* Time taken for policy update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("time_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_time_metrics_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "environment_metrics" (
  "env_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each environmental record */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the environmental record belongs to */,
  "step" TEXT /* Step of the training process (e.g., Step_0, Step_1) */,
  "n_timesteps" INTEGER /* Number of timesteps */,
  "sample_process_time" REAL /* Time taken for the sample process */,
  "env_reset_time" REAL /* Time taken for environment reset */,
  "env_step_time" REAL /* Time taken for environment step */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("env_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_environment_metrics_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data scientist, admin) */,
  "organization" TEXT /* Organization of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "dataset_name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  "size_in_mb" INTEGER /* Size of the dataset in megabytes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the model */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of the model (e.g., neural network, decision tree) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hardware_config" (
  "hardware_config_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hardware configuration */,
  "hardware_config_name" TEXT /* Name of the hardware configuration */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the hardware configuration */,
  "num_cpus" INTEGER /* Number of CPUs */,
  "num_gpus" INTEGER /* Number of GPUs */,
  "memory_in_mb" INTEGER /* Memory in megabytes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hardware_config_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the experiment */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the experiment was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, modify) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_access_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "iterations" (
  "iteration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each iteration */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the iteration belongs to */,
  "iteration_number" INTEGER /* Number of the iteration */,
  "iteration_time" REAL /* Time taken for the iteration */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the iteration (e.g., completed, running, failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("iteration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_iterations_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_versions" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model version */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the model version belongs to */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version number of the model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the model version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the model version was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_versions_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)
